meanings.definition: the basic human power of intelligent thought and perception
examples: he used his wits to get ahead
I was scared out of my wits
he still had all his marbles and was in full possession of a lively mind

meanings.definition: a message whose ingenuity or verbal skill or incongruity has the power to evoke laughter

examples: he's got plenty of brains but no common sense

meanings.definition: a witty amusing person who makes jokes
